name: dfmt_grep
description: Search for text pattern in files. Use this instead of native Grep.

files.description: Basename glob (e.g., *.go, *.txt). Applied per visited file under the search root.

intent.description: What you need from the results. Only matching results returned.

path.description: Directory or file to scope the search to (relative to project root or absolute under it). Defaults to the project root.
